high_descs: Hang a right at the round table, turn left at the wall and walk to the wooden table by the window.
Pick up the tall statue at the back right corner of the table.
Turn around and walk to the small table next to the couch.
Turn on the small lamp on the table.
anns.task_desc: Examine a statue by the light of a small lamp.
anns.task_dec: Examine a statue by the light of a small lamp.
robot_human_memory1-1: Human: Hello, I've been thinking about the statue in the living room. I feel like it's missing something, perhaps a bit of lighting. Do we have a small lamp we can use?
Human: Not yet, I want to consider the best way to illuminate the statue. The desk lamp, does it have different light settings?
Human: That's good to know. I think the low setting might work best, it should highlight the statue without overpowering it. What do you think?
Human: Yes, exactly! I want the light to bring out the statue's details. Could you tell me more about the statue? I've forgotten them details over time.
anns.task_desc1-1: Human: Oh, I remember now. I think it will look even more beautiful with the right lighting. Please, examine the statue by the light of the small lamp.

Human: That's good to know. I think the low setting might work best, it should highlight the statue without overpowering it. What do you think?
Human: Yes, exactly! I want the light to bring out the statue's details. Could you tell me more about the statue? I've forgotten them details over time.
anns.task_desc1-2: Human: Oh, I remember now. I think it will look even more beautiful with the right lighting. Please, inspect the intricate craftsmanship of the 'Venus de Milo' under the soft glow of the petite desk illumination.
robot_human_memory1-3: Human: Hello, I've been pondering about the sculpture adorning our living room. I sense it's incomplete, possibly needing a touch of light. Do we possess a compact illuminator to aid with this?
Human: Not presently, I wish to contemplate on the optimal method to highlight the sculpture. The table illuminator, does it offer varied luminosity options?
Human: That's valuable information. I believe the low mode might be the most fitting, it should emphasize the sculpture without dominating it. What is your opinion?
Human: Precisely! I desire the light to accentuate the sculpture's intricacies. Could you elaborate on the sculpture? I've lost touch with them specifics over the years.
anns.task_desc1-3: Human: Ah, it's coming back to me now. I believe it will appear even more splendid under the appropriate light. Kindly, scrutinize the sculpture under the light of the compact illuminator.
robot_human_memory2-1: Human: Hello, I've been thinking about the statue in the living room, it reminds me of Candle Glow's goofiness. I feel like it's missing something, perhaps a bit of lighting. Do we have a small lamp we can use? Candle Glow often talks about the importance of good lighting.

Human: Not yet, I want to consider the best way to illuminate the statue. The desk lamp, does it have different light settings? Candle Glow would probably turn this into a teaching moment about the science of light.

Human: That's good to know. I think the low setting might work best, it should highlight the statue without overpowering it. What do you think? Candle Glow would probably make a corny joke about this.

Human: Yes, exactly! I want the light to bring out the statue's details. Could you tell me more about the statue? I've forgotten them details over time. Candle Glow can probably recite them all from memory, he loves sharing these kinds of facts.

high_descs: Walk towards the table then turn right and walk forwards.
Turn left and pick up the statue that is on the wooden side-table.
Turn around and walk towards the wooden side-table next to the couch.
Turn on the lamp on top of the table.
anns.task_desc: Pick up the statue from the table and turn on the lamp.

high_descs: Walk down the hallway into the living room and turn right, walk past the couch and turn left towards the brown coffee table.
Pick up the brown statue behind the plant in the gold pot.
Turn around and head to the small brown coffee table next to the couch with the lamp.
Turn the lamp on that's on the small table next to the couch.
anns.task_desc: To pick up the statue and turn on the lamp next to the couch.
